properties.Test Case: Make a page with multiple text boxes. Type a sentence into Text box 1. Pause until your sentence is highlighted. Click into Text Box 2. Type a sentence there. Wait. The highlight should now be in Box 2
properties.Steps:
Make a page with multiple text boxes.  Type a sentence into Text box 1. Pause until your sentence is highlighted.
Click into Text Box 2. Type a sentence there. Wait. The highlight should now be in Box 2
